initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['delegate']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Analyze the provided problem description to identify the core logical or algorithmic components required to solve it. Decompose the problem into a set of focused subproblems that, when solved individually, provide the necessary building blocks for the final solution. Each helper should be assigned a single, specific task that directly addresses one of these components. Ensure the subproblems are distinct and cover all necessary steps of the problem-solving process.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "delegate",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "helpers": [
    {
      "label": "helper_1",
      "instructions": "plain-text subproblem for the first helper"
    }
  ],
  "synthesis_brief": "how the parent should combine the child results"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B2-usaco-2023-us-open-gold-tree-merging
Title: B2. USACO 2023 US Open Gold / Tree Merging

Problem:
Reconstruct a valid sequence of sibling-merge operations that transforms an initial rooted tree into a final rooted tree.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
